sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - turn-based strategy game with grid-based movement on hexagonal tiles

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Units have limited movement points replenished at the beginning of each turn. Movement occurs on hexagonal grid tiles in isometric perspective.

special_mechanics.name: Turn System Options
special_mechanics.description: Sequential (classic) turn order or simultaneous turns. Actions in simultaneous mode are queued and executed together.

tier_notes: Age of Wonders is a turn-based strategy game, not a platformer or action game. Traditional physics parameters (gravity, jump, acceleration, etc.) do not apply. Movement is abstracted as movement points on a hexagonal grid system. No sub-pixel rendering or character-level movement physics documented.
note: This game is not suitable for movement physics extraction as it is a turn-based strategy title with grid-based movement mechanics rather than real-time physics simulation.
